title: Tetrion Fluorescent Orange Spray Paint for Wood, Metal, Ceramic & Plastic - Indoor & Outdoor Durable, Bright Neon Colours 400 ml (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
VERSATILE SURFACE COMPATIBILITY: Our fluorescent spray paint adheres smoothly to wood, metal, ceramic, and plastic, creating a vivid, eye-catching finish on each surface.
ALL-WEATHER USAGE: Designed for both indoor and outdoor applications, this spray paint withstands elements providing long-lasting vibrancy and durability on any project.
USER-FRIENDLY APPLICATION: Effortlessly spray on professional-quality finishes, thanks to the easy-to-use design suitable for beginners ensuring smooth, even coverage.
INDOOR & OUTDOOR RELIABILITY: Tetrion spray paint delivers durable, weather-resistant results, keeping colours bright and lively in any setting, from garden furniture to indoor art.
WIDE RANGE OF COLOURS: Available in a spectrum of fluorescent shades, this spray paint adds a unique and bright touch to your creative projects, ensuring they truly pop.
